name: better-convex-nuxt
description: Full-featured Convex integration for Nuxt with SSR, real-time subscriptions, authentication, and permissions
author: Matthias Amon <ma4m0>

scripts.prepack: npm run build:devtools && nuxt-module-build build && npm run check:package-exports -- --dist
scripts.dev: npm run dev:prepare && nuxi dev --cwd playground --dotenv .env.local
scripts.dev:prepare: nuxt-module-build build --stub && nuxt-module-build prepare && nuxi prepare --cwd playground --dotenv .env.local
scripts.release: npm run lint && npm run test:types && npm run check:contracts && npm run test && npm run prepack && git tag -l | xargs git tag -d && git fetch --tags origin && changelogen --release && npm publish && git push --follow-tags
scripts.lint: npm run check:no-legacy-query-api && npm run check:no-legacy-call-api && npm run check:no-legacy-generated-api-imports && npm run check:no-stale-doc-imports && npm run check:no-query-composables-in-middleware && npm run check:no-use-route-in-middleware && npm run check:no-middleware-query-docs && npm run check:no-starter-generated-artifacts && eslint .
scripts.check:contracts: npm run check:api-surface-docs && npm run check:package-exports && npm run check:workspace-deps && npm run check:consumer-smoke && npm run check:missing-convex-api && npm run check:better-auth-local-component
scripts.check:consumer-smoke: nuxi prepare --cwd test/fixtures/consumer-smoke && nuxi typecheck --cwd test/fixtures/consumer-smoke
scripts.check:missing-convex-api: nuxi prepare --cwd test/fixtures/missing-convex-api && nuxi typecheck --cwd test/fixtures/missing-convex-api
scripts.check:no-legacy-query-api: sh -c '! rg -n "useConvexQueryLazy|useConvexPaginatedQueryLazy|with-default|useConvex(Query|PaginatedQuery)[^\n]*default\\b" src playground docs test starters'
scripts.check:no-legacy-call-api: sh -c '! rg -n "\\.execute(Safe)?\\b|const \\{ execute" src playground docs/content starters'
scripts.check:no-legacy-generated-api-imports: sh -c '! rg -n "from ['"'"'\"](?:~~|~)/convex/_generated/api['"'"'\"]" README.md docs/content docs/installation2.md starters/*/app playground/pages playground/components playground/composables playground/middleware playground/server src/runtime/composables'
scripts.check:no-stale-doc-imports: sh -c '! rg -n "better-convex-nuxt/composables|getQueryKey is intentionally" README.md docs/content docs/installation2.md starters playground test/fixtures'
